description: This pipeline adds data annotations containing image properties to an image and then sets specific annotations based on determined expressions, creating a processed output with enhanced metadata.

f81cb0da-ad52-4c98-bcba-d596a18fd2c7.name: image-properties-to-annotation
f81cb0da-ad52-4c98-bcba-d596a18fd2c7.description: Adds data annotations that contain the image properties.

39b6dd86-517f-401f-938a-3bb00ace618a.name: annotate-set-single
39b6dd86-517f-401f-938a-3bb00ace618a.description: Sets a single annotation. The name and the value are determined by expressions
